overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dystopian urban environment during golden hour. The player moves from beneath a concrete overpass into an open street dominated by a massive derelict megastructure, passing neon-lit stalls, abandoned vehicles, and futuristic architecture.

events.description: camera pans down from sky to street level and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: looking up at a contrail in the sky then panning down to street level and beginning to walk under the overpass

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial structure with yellow panels and antennae on top
massive concrete bridge structure forming a canopy overhead
futuristic neon-lit triangular signage with green and purple lighting

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view of the sky showing a contrail, then pans down to reveal a yellow industrial tower and the entrance to a concrete overpass. The player begins walking forward into the covered area as natural golden hour lighting mixes with artificial neon glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market area beneath overpass with neon lighting

events.description: entering shaded area under overpass with artificial neon lighting becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dimly lit covered area beneath the concrete overpass

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structure with various goods and equipment displayed
futuristic blue-lit vertical display panel showing data or advertisements
burning fire in a barrel providing warm orange light in the shaded area

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered area beneath the overpass, the scene is dominated by artificial neon lighting and shadows. Futuristic market stalls and a campfire are visible on the right as the player moves through this sheltered urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban street with massive derelict megastructure

events.description: exiting covered overpass into open street with full sky visibility and golden hour lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to abandoned vehicles, approaching the massive derelict structure on the left

notable_agents.action: sitting near a campfire on the sidewalk next to an abandoned car

entered.detail: massive crashed or abandoned space station structure with exposed rusted metal framework and scaffolding
futuristic blue and black sports car parked on the sidewalk
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass into bright golden hour sunlight, the massive derelict megastructure dominates the left side of the frame. The player walks along a street lined with abandoned cars and graffiti-covered walls, passing an NPC sitting near a campfire.

events.description: white futuristic sedan drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward and across the intersection, observing the surroundings and passing vehicle

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: floating rectangular holographic advertisement sign glowing with cyan light
tall palm tree silhouetted against the golden hour sky

segments.scene_description: Approaching an open intersection, the player continues walking as the derelict megastructure looms larger on the left. A holographic billboard floats in the distance, and a white futuristic sedan drives across the intersection from right to left as the player crosses the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sheltered industrial underpass into a wide, sun-drenched urban intersection dominated by a derelict megastructure. It begins with a view of a contrail in the sky before panning down to a yellow industrial tower and moving forward into a concrete overpass, where natural golden hour light blends with an artificial neon glow. As the camera progresses through this sheltered corridor, the environment becomes a mix of deep shadows and vibrant neon, passing futuristic market stalls and a small campfire. The scene then opens into bright sunlight as the player emerges from the overpass, walking past graffiti-covered walls and abandoned cars while the massive megastructure looms over the left side of the frame. Finally, the camera approaches an open intersection where a holographic billboard floats in the distance and a white futuristic sedan drives across the road.
